en_title: Pokémon Pokopia Free Update and 3-Part Expansion Pass DLC Revealed
cn_title: 《宝可梦Pokopia》免费更新与三弹DLC公布
subtitle: 水下新世界
opus_summary: 《宝可梦Pokopia》在2026年6月任天堂直面会上宣布将迎来大量新内容，包括8月的免费水下主题更新，以及付费三弹扩展通行证（34.99美元，约合人民币250元）。第一弹“泡泡盆地”8月上线，第二弹2026年底，第三弹2027年。购买通行证可获限定道具。

paragraphs.en: Pokémon Pokopia is getting loads of new content, both in the form of a free update and a paid, three-part expansion pass.
paragraphs.cn: 《宝可梦Pokopia》将迎来大量新内容，包括免费更新和付费的三弹扩展通行证。

paragraphs.en: As announced during today’s June 2026 Nintendo Direct, fans of the social sim sandbox spin-off were told they can look forward to jumping into new, underwater-themed content starting with a free update in August 2026. Additionally, DLC is coming by way of a paid expansion.
paragraphs.cn: 在今日的2026年6月任天堂直面会上，这款社交模拟沙盒衍生作品的粉丝们得知，从2026年8月的免费更新开始，他们将能体验全新的水下主题内容。此外，付费扩展DLC也将推出。

paragraphs.en: The expansion pass itself, which is available to purchase via the Nintendo eShop today, will cover three releases. Part 1: Bubbly Basin is also due out in August 2026, with Part 2 expected in late 2026, and Part 3 set for 2027. You can see the first teaser trailer for everything yet to come to Pokémon Pokopia below.
paragraphs.cn: 扩展通行证本身即日起可通过任天堂eShop购买，将包含三弹内容。第一弹「泡泡盆地」也将在2026年8月推出，第二弹预计2026年底，第三弹定于2027年。以下是《宝可梦Pokopia》未来所有内容的首支预告片。

paragraphs.en: "The Pokémon Pokopia experience continues under the sea with a free update arriving this August!" an officila description from Nintendo said. "Players will be able to explore the ocean floor using the new move Dive to plant grass, build structures, and create their own underwater towns alongside Pokémon.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂的官方描述称：「《宝可梦Pokopia》的体验将在水下延续，免费更新将于今年8月到来！玩家将能使用新招式「潜水」探索海底，种植水草、建造建筑，并与宝可梦一起创建自己的水下城镇。」

paragraphs.en: "The Pokémon Pokopia Expansion Pass paid DLC is also on the way, introducing three parts of additional content. Part 1 of the Pokémon Pokopia Expansion Pass paid DLC, Bubbly Basin, will launch this August and invite players to 'Dive' into a new underwater town filled with new furniture, outfits, and Pokémon friends."
paragraphs.cn: 「《宝可梦Pokopia》扩展通行证付费DLC也即将推出，包含三部分额外内容。第一弹「泡泡盆地」将于今年8月上线，邀请玩家『潜入』一个充满新家具、新服装和宝可梦朋友的全新水下城镇。」

paragraphs.en: Fotoage from today's Pokémon Pokopia DLC reveal trailer showed how players can use the new dive mechanic introduced with the upcoming free 2.0 update to reach previously unexplored, submerged parts of the game. That comes with a trove of possibilities, with Bubbly Basin, specifically, introducing an underwater town with ocean Pokémon, new themed furniture, and new outfits. For now, all we know about Part 2 is that it will come with another new town, with Nintendo currently keeping its cards close to its chest when it comes to Part 3.
paragraphs.cn: 今日《宝可梦Pokopia》DLC预告片展示了玩家如何利用即将到来的免费2.0更新引入的新潜水机制，到达游戏中此前未探索的水下区域。这带来了无限可能，尤其是「泡泡盆地」将引入一个水下城镇，包含海洋宝可梦、新主题家具和新服装。目前，关于第二弹我们只知道它将带来另一个新城镇，而任天堂对第三弹的内容守口如瓶。

paragraphs.en: The Pokémon Company has told players that committing to all three DLCs with by purchasing the expansion pass, which is now confirmed to be $34.99 , that they'll be able to claim a recipe for dynamic Ditto print blocks and wallpaper. Those who pick up the pass by Tuesday, August 31, 2026, will also receive a code for 30 rare Pokémetal ingots.
paragraphs.cn: 宝可梦公司告知玩家，购买扩展通行证（现已确认为34.99美元，约合人民币250元）即可获得动态百变怪印花方块和壁纸的配方。在2026年8月31日（星期二）前购买通行证的玩家，还将获得30个稀有宝可金属锭的兑换码。

paragraphs.en: It's unclear when Nintendo will have more Pokémon Pokopia news to share, but for now, it looks like Pokémon fans will have a lot to look forward to in August. For all of the biggest news from today’s presentation, you can see everything announced at the June 2026 Nintendo Direct here .
paragraphs.cn: 目前尚不清楚任天堂何时会分享更多《宝可梦Pokopia》的消息，但就目前而言，宝可梦粉丝们在8月将有很多值得期待的内容。关于今日发布会上的所有重大新闻，你可以在此处查看2026年6月任天堂直面会上公布的全部内容。
